title: pyrethrum kelleri
intro: Pyrethrum kelleri, also known as Argentine pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its pyrethrins, which have been shown to have antimicrobial, antifungal, and insecticidal properties. The health benefits of pyrethrum kelleri include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and creams, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and skincare products.
